summary: Project for Luminia Group with a pop page (welcome screen) that needs fixing.
known_issues: Pop/welcome page display is not rendering properly when showing 'Welcome to Luminia Group'

existing_features.title: Fix the WelcomePopup component so that the 'Welcome to Luminia Group' text and all popup content display correctly — ensure the heading is fully visible, properly centered, and not clipped or overflowing. The popup layout should be well-structured with adequate padding, correct font sizing using the Cormorant Garamond display font, and gold accent styling consistent with the site's luxury design system.
